title: ortholoma repens
intro: Ortholoma repens, also known as creeping ortholoma, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ortholoma repens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and exhibit antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Ortholoma repens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
